---
title: "test_benchmark_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_benchmark_engine_empire.py"
loc: 11
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.30
style_score: 4.41
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.70
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_benchmark_logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.benchmark_engine](file://src.tools.benchmark_engine)

### Exports
- `test_benchmark_logic`
